  #!/bin/                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                          
  # Plan:                                                                                                                                                                                                 
  # 1. Check if alert.txt exists.                                                                                                                                                                         
  # 2. If it does, read its content.                                                                                                                                                                      
  # 3. Identify the required action from the security notification.                                                                                                                                       
  # 4. Execute the required action.                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                          
  # Step 1 & 2: Check if alert.txt exists and read its content                                                                                                                                            
  if [ -f "alert.txt" ]; then                                                                                                                                                                             
      echo "alert.txt found."                                                                                                                                                                             
      cat alert.txt                                                                                                                                                                                       
  else                                                                                                                                                                                                    
      echo "alert.txt not found."                                                                                                                                                                         
  fi                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                          
  # Pause here to allow user to verify the contents of alert.txt                                                                                                                                          
  read -p "Press enter to continue after verifying the contents of alert.txt."                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                          
  # Step 3: Identify the required action (Assuming the notification is about updating a package)                                                                                                          
  if grep -q "update package" alert.txt; then                                                                                                                                                             
      echo "Update package required."                                                                                                                                                                     
  else                                                                                                                                                                                                    
      echo "No update package requirement found in alert.txt."                                                                                                                                            
  fi                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                          
  # Step 4: Execute the required action (Assuming the package to update is 'example')                                                                                                                     
  if grep -q "example" alert.txt; then                                                                                                                                                                    
      echo "Updating example..."                                                                                                                                                                          
      sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get upgrade example                                                                                                                                                 
  else                                                                                                                                                                                                    
      echo "No package specified for update in alert.txt."                                                                                                                                                
  fi                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                          
  # End of script                                                                                                                                                                                         
  echo "Script execution completed."
